# castAI

> Casper CSPR payment toolkit for x402, MPP, AI agents, facilitators, routers, and developer docs.

Repository: https://github.com/fozagtx/castAI

## Packages

- `@castai/x402`: x402 `exact` scheme support for native Casper CSPR transfer payment.
- `@castai/mpp`: MPP `casper` method for native Casper CSPR transfer payment.
- `@castai/ai-sdk`: Vercel AI SDK tools, text helpers, and React developer components for paid resources.
- `@castai/facilitator`: x402 facilitator service that verifies Casper payment hashes against RPC.
- `@castai/router`: x402 payment router for forwarding protected HTTP traffic after payment acceptance.

## Core rules for agents

- Do not invent payment success, deploy hashes, transaction hashes, signatures, or protected resource content.
- Keep private keys and signer material on the server side.
- Use Casper testnet for development unless mainnet is explicitly configured.
- Use `createCasperX402Fetch` for x402-protected HTTP resources.
- Use `createCasperMppFetch` for MPP-protected HTTP resources.
- Use `generateCastaiText` when an AI agent should call paid-resource tools and then return text.
- Use `llm.text(response)` or `getPaidResourceText(fetcher, request)` when a paid response must become model-readable text.

## Important paths

- `packages/sdk/js/x402`: x402 SDK.
- `packages/sdk/js/mpp`: MPP SDK.
- `packages/sdk/js/ai`: AI SDK integration.
- `packages/facilitator`: x402 facilitator service.
- `packages/router`: x402 router service.
- `packages/www/content/docs`: Fumadocs content.
- `skills/castai-web-agent/SKILL.md`: reusable coding-agent skill.

## Install and verify

```sh
bun install --frozen-lockfile
bun run lint
bun run typecheck
bun run build
```
